message.content:
Subject: Request for Extension on [Assignment Name]

Hi Professor [Last Name],

I hope you’re doing well. I’m writing about the [assignment/project name] that was due on [original due date]. I wasn’t able to submit it on time, and I wanted to explain rather than just let it slide.

Over the last few days, [briefly explain the reason—e.g., I’ve been dealing with X / had an unexpected family situation / had overlapping deadlines and mismanaged my time]. I underestimated how much it would affect my ability to finish the assignment by the deadline, and that’s on me.

I’m still committed to doing the work properly, not just rushing something in. Would it be possible to get an extension until [proposed new date]? If that’s not feasible or if there’s a late penalty, I completely understand and will accept whatever you decide. I just didn’t want to go silent about it.

Thank you for considering this, and again, I’m sorry for missing the original deadline. I really appreciate your time and any flexibility you can offer.

Best,  
[Your Name]  
[Course Name and Section, if applicable]
